scripts.setup: bun install --ignore-scripts && bun run setup-contracts && bun run ui:vendor && bun run ui:build-ts
scripts.install:anvil: bash -lc 'if ! command -v anvil >/dev/null 2>&1; then curl -L https://foundry.paradigm.xyz | bash && export PATH="$HOME/.foundry/bin:$PATH" && foundryup; fi'
scripts.compile-contracts: cd solidity && bun x tsc --project tsconfig-compile.json && bun run ./js/compile.js
scripts.generate: bun run compile-contracts && bun run ui:vendor
scripts.tsc: bun run generate && bun x tsc --noEmit
scripts.ui:setup: bun install --ignore-scripts && cd solidity && bun install --ignore-scripts && cd .. && bun run generate && cd ui && npm ci --ignore-scripts && npm run build
scripts.ui:build: bun run generate && cd ui && npm ci --ignore-scripts && npm run build
scripts.ui:serve: bun run generate && bun run ui:build-ts && bun ./ui/dev-server.mjs
scripts.test-peripherals: cd solidity && bun run compile-contracts && bun run test-peripherals
scripts.test-escalation-game: cd solidity && bun run compile-contracts && bun run test-escalation-game
scripts.test-question-data: cd solidity && bun run compile-contracts && bun run test-question-data
scripts.test-auction: cd solidity && bun run compile-contracts && bun run test-auction
scripts.format: bun x prettier --write solidity/ts/**/*.ts ui/ts/**/*.ts ui/ts/**/*.tsx ui/css/**/*.css && bun x eslint . --config eslint.config.js --fix
